### Post by jwbrase on 2009-04-06
I have put an English text into a binary encoding. The characters used in this encoding scheme are the 26 letters of the alphabet, plus the space. The challenge is to decode the binary back into English text.

```
10010101011100100100001111011011000110110100000011010101100111000001101111110110001110000001110111010110110001101101000000110011100010101001011100010010101001100011101110111010000
1101011011011101100010001101010110011100010010101001000101011110010100011111010100010111011001111010110000001011011000000100101010011011001110000101010010111101111000000011011010100010001001011011000001000
1100010110110000010001101010110011100011011101100111100101001011100011011100111000000101010110011011011100110101000100101100001010110110001000
01101100000100011010101100111000100101010010001010101000111111011100001011101100111101010000110110000000101101101000000101010100011111101110000100101010111011011000001000
10110110000001001010100100010111010011000101010000110110101000110111011001111010101100111000111001010100101110011001010100100010000101010010101011011100110000001011110110001000
0110110000010000111101101100011011000010010110000011111001101110010001001010100111011100001001011110111000011011000001000011110110110001101100001001011000011010110110110001010100010010101001110111000
011011000001000011110110110001101100001001011000011010001111011011000110110000100101010011101110000100101111011100001001100010101000101101100000010010101001000101010100011111101110110000011000100000011010010110110001010100010010101001110111000
10110110000001001010100100010111010011000101010000110110101000110111011001111010101100111000111001010100101110011001010100100010000101010010101011011100110000001011110110001

```
